channel.title: "The package "@frontity/my-first-theme" doesn't seem to be installed"
channel.description:
Hi all. I'm trying to work with the tutorial
I've hit an issue when following the instructions on this page: https://tutorial.frontity.org/part1-creating-a-custom-theme/create-a-theme-package
When do "npx frontity dev", I get the error: "The package "@frontity/my-first-theme" doesn't seem to be installed"
This is after I've followed the previous steps, and create the "my first theme" project. The project exists under the 'packages' directory. The directory under packages is named 'my-first-theme'. The package.json file within that directory has the name/value pair: 'name', 'my-first-theme'.
What could be the issue here?

item.title: "The package "@frontity/my-first-theme" doesn't seem to be installed"
item.dc:creator: fingersmalloy
item.description:
Hi all. I’m trying to work with the tutorial

I’ve hit an issue when following the instructions on this page:

tutorial.frontity.org

Create a Theme Package

When do “npx frontity dev”, I get the error:
“The package “@frontity/my-first-theme” doesn’t seem to be installed”

This is after I’ve followed the previous steps, and create the “my first theme” project.
The project exists under the ‘packages’ directory.
The directory under packages is named ‘my-first-theme’.
The package.json file within that directory has the name/value pair: ‘name’, ‘my-first-theme’.

What could be the issue here?

Read full topic
item.source: "The package "@frontity/my-first-theme" doesn't seem to be installed"
